length_checks.description: Length measurement — indicates bounds checking may follow

safe_string_ops.description: Bounded string operations — prevents simple overflow but check n parameter

safe_math.description: Safe integer arithmetic — prevents integer overflow in size calculations

input_validation.description: Input parsing/validation — narrows attacker input to expected types

path_sanitizers.description: Path canonicalization — prevents traversal if combined with prefix check

memory_safety.description: Memory clearing — prevents info leaks from uninitialized buffers

access_control.description: Access control checks — validates permissions before dangerous operations

error_handling.description: Exception/signal handling — may catch exploitation attempts
